prospects.name: Avery Maintainer
prospects.project_description: An open-source runtime for durable agent jobs and tool execution.
prospects.research_text: Agent Runtime dispatches long-running tool jobs to isolated workers and preserves logs, retries, and output artifacts for review.

prospects.name: Morgan Builder
prospects.project_description: MCP tools that launch batch inference and data processing jobs.
prospects.research_text: MCP Worker lets agent clients launch observable batch inference tasks and retrieve generated files when execution completes.
